Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=healthcare-analyst Items: 1 · Forecasts emitted: 1 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-07-17 · [research_task] 评估药明康德1260H名单影响

DONE · owner=healthcare-analyst

评估药明康德列入1260H名单后，对公司H2及中长期海外订单与业绩预测的冲击，以及同业是否能承接订单转移。参考 section 4 协同需求中 healthcare-analyst 的 follow_up。

  • Outcome: research:药明康德 → completed | dir=sessions/a5a242d6-ca0c-4de2-bf08-b662e090aa8e | summary: 药明康德基本面强，但当前价格已经接近合理估值中枢。公司2025年营业收入454.56亿元、归母净利润191.51亿元，2026年第一季度收入人民币12.44 billion、同比增长28.8%，持续经营业务在手订单人民币59.77 billion、同比增长23.6%，显示短期经营动能较强[S1][S3]。公司2026年全年收入指引为人民币51.3-53.0 billion，持续经营业务收入指引为同比增长18%-22%，为2026年收入预测提供锚点[S2]。 | → 1 forecast(s) on 药明康德, 0 position(s)…

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: 药明康德
